canonical_definition: A one-shot bargaining game used to measure altruism and fairness, where one player unilaterally decides how to split a sum of money with a passive recipient.
papers: Can Large Language Model Agents Simulate Human Trust Behavior?
EAI: Emotional Decision-Making of LLMs in Strategic Games and Ethical Dilemmas
